name: G N A Axles Limited
summary: G N A Axles Limited, together with its subsidiary, manufactures and sells auto components for the four-wheeler industry in India. It offers a range of rear axle shafts for use in on-highway and off-highway vehicles, as well as for light, medium, and heavy commercial vehicles. The company also provides other shafts, including drive shafts, power take-off shafts, hydraulic lift shafts, and transmission shafts. In addition, it offers spindles that are used in assembling the axle for automobiles. The company serves original equipment manufacturers and tier-I suppliers in Asia, Europe, South America, North America, and Australia. G N A Axles Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hoshiarpur, India.
